case_title: MARK EDMONDS,JR VS. RAINTREE 973MARKET NEWCO LLC

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HEIDI GOULD, REGIONAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT RAINTREE 973MARKET NEWCO LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDMONDS,JR, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAINTREE 973MARKET NEWCO LLC $2,486.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,486.40, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS THE RENT REDUCTION FOR LACK OF DEAD BOLT FOR 12 MONTHS (10% OF RENT - $2072). IT DOES NOT INCLUDE ANY CLAIM CONCERNING BUILDING'S BACK DOOR MONITOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAINTREE 973MARKET NEWCO LLC
